prompt:
A cinematic tech-themed TikTok/Douyin vertical thumbnail for a Chinese AI tutorial video. Dark GitHub-style background: deep gradient from #0d1117 to #1c2333. Top area: series badge '普通人也能用好OpenClaw · 第2篇' in small blue pill badge. Center-top: large cartoon lobster mascot (orange-red, cute style) holding a glowing golden API key, with sparkle effects around it. Center: massive bold Chinese title '免费获取
大模型API' in gradient blue (#58a6ff to #79c0ff), font-weight 900, two lines, centered. Below title: bright green badge '9000万 tokens 免费额度' with glow effect. Lower section: three platform cards side by side (智谱AI / 硅基流动 / 百度千帆) with green checkmarks, glassmorphism style cards. Bottom: orange accent bar with '完全免费 · 注册即用' text. Background: floating token coins, soft blue and orange bokeh light orbs, subtle grid pattern. Overall mood: exciting, professional, mobile-first design. 9:16 aspect ratio, 1080x1920px, TikTok/Douyin thumbnail style.
